podcasts.name: AI & I by Every
podcasts.title: How Every's Team Used AI to Ship Its Biggest Launch Ever
podcasts.transcript:
Speaker 1 | 00:00 - 00:17
We generated the largest subscription revenue increase in Everest's history last week. We did it by launching this thing called the Builder Pack. Basically, we partnered with a bunch of the AI tools we use every day, and subscribers to the Builder Pack get discounts and credits to those tools. So thousand dollars in Codex credits, twelve months of free cursor access,

Speaker 2 | 00:17 - 00:17
all that kind of stuff.

For this episode, I had the team who worked on the Builder Pack. Everything from conception all the way to the full execution at launch come to the show to share how we did it and what we learned. I hope you like it.
